title: ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression
innovation_summary: ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression: In this work, we propose a new objective that lifts the threshold constraints for robust KV compression, advocating for "threshold-free" methods that adaptively adjust budget allocation.
